title: Bell Inequalities and Nonlocality
description: Explore the foundations of quantum nonlocality through Bell inequalities. Understand CHSH, how quantum mechanics violates classical bounds, and the implications for our understanding of physical reality.
learningObjectives: Derive the CHSH inequality from local hidden variable assumptions
Calculate quantum violations of Bell inequalities
Understand Tsirelson's bound and why quantum mechanics is limited
Analyze loopholes in Bell experiments and how they are closed
Implement Bell test simulations with realistic noise
Connect Bell nonlocality to device-independent protocols
